ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the employee's profile picture */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (encrypted for security) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of employment contract (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-department relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employee in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employee in the department (if applicable) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role within the department */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., Bachelor, Master) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "year_completed" TEXT /* Year the degree was completed */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) at the institution */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study or major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_education" (
  "employee_education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-education relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education record */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the education */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the education */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade or class standing */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_education_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_education_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "level" TEXT /* Hierarchical level of the job title (e.g., junior, senior, lead) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_titles" (
  "employee_job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-job title relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job title */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job title (if applicable) */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Overall performance rating for the job title */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_titles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_titles_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the salary */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the salary (if applicable) */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Annual bonus amount */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payments (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Score of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of performance review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "improvement_plan" TEXT /* Plan for improvement (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-training relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in the training program */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a certificate was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issuing_body" TEXT /* Body that issued the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the certification needs to be renewed */,
  "renewal_fee" REAL /* Fee for renewing the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_certifications" (
  "employee_certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-certification relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the certification needs to be renewed */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the certification renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_certifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_certifications_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., employee profile, department, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
